property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17 in;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java in;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;c:\Users\NTV\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;c:\Users\NTV\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\copilotCli;C:\Users\NTV\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17 in;C:\hadoop in;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\cursoresources\app in;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Users\NTV\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\NTV\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\NTV\.dotnet	ools;C:\Program Files\dotnet;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17 in;C:\Program Files lutter_windows_3.38.5-stable lutter in;C:\Users\NTV\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity in;C:\Users\NTV\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.13 in;C:\Users\NTV\AppData\Local\Python in;c:\Users\NTV\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.58.5 undled\scripts
oConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: testMonitoringUsersApi10Times
testcase.system-out:
Request method: GET Request URI: http://localhost:62381/api/users Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Type: application/json Matched-Stub-Id: 70279d3b-4735-4ef5-a8e9-ce78674cc0ce Vary: Accept-Encoding, User-Agent Content-Encoding: gzip Transfer-Encoding: chunked

testcase.name: testSlaForApis[GET, /users, 200, 2000](1)
testcase.system-out:
Request method: GET Request URI: http://localhost:62381/api/users Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Type: application/json Matched-Stub-Id: 70279d3b-4735-4ef5-a8e9-ce78674cc0ce Vary: Accept-Encoding, User-Agent Content-Encoding: gzip Transfer-Encoding: chunked
{ "page": 1, "per_page": 6, "total": 12, "total_pages": 2, "data": [ { "id": 1, "email": "george.bluth@reqres.in", "first_name": "George", "last_name": "Bluth", "avatar": "https://reqres.in/img/faces/1-image.jpg" } ] } [SLA] GET /users -> 14 ms
